name: SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResDC_ISO
title: SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResDC_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResDC_Iso ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[] )
description: Creates a Metering Receipt Response message for sending, using the DC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
